finding: The publication-boundary validator existed as source and tests but was not independently enforced for every Cloudflare research-surface change.

behavior: runs the existing deterministic publication-policy tests
fails closed on diagnosis, treatment, payment, or missing epistemic-boundary markers
retains the exact JSON decision as a 30-day workflow artifact
uses read-only repository permissions and performs no deployment

verification.method: isolated Node test against byte-identical workflow and contract-test contents before commit
assertions: policy tests execute before source validation
Cloudflare research changes and main pushes trigger the gate
workflow has read-only permissions and no deployment or payment action
exact boundary result is retained as an artifact

limits: The gate is deterministic policy enforcement, not medical or scientific review.
This workflow does not prove a Cloudflare deployment or hostname.
Pattern-based checks may miss novel or indirect prohibited claims.
The separate deployment workflow still requires valid Cloudflare environment credentials.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository source and workflow metadata were inspected; no private chat, health records, credentials, or identifying personal material were published.
